'''Nebulba''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] and a member of the famous [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] family, and The [[Sebolto]] Clan of [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]]. He had a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] posted on his head around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], which had been specifically ordered by a hateful rival of his podracing relative, the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Mawhonic/Legends|Mawhonic]]. The bounty was eventually collected by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Behind the scenes==
The bounty was worth 3000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for a live capture, but was reduced to 1500 credits for being taken dead.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
